simon-notes.source_attribution: Originally prepared by Vignesh Siva. Transcribed, expanded & updated to 2026 regulations by Nixon Antony, 2/E, Maersk A/S.

simon-notes-p1.html.summary: Maritime security (UKMTO/MSCHOA), IS Code intact stability criteria, CII/CF, STCW Manila amendments, hours of rest, lifeboat testing, cyber security, GISIS, MARPOL Annex VI, IMO DCS, GHG strategy, watchkeeping, LSA Code.

miw-notes-mgmt-p1.html.title: IMO Structure & Conventions

miw-notes-mgmt-p1.html.gating_note: Applied full content-protection stack this session (gate script, noindex/nofollow/noarchive/nosnippet robots meta, user-select:none, copy/contextmenu/selectstart JS blocks, diagonal watermark). Original upload had robots='index, follow' and no gate — corrected. Footer text also corrected: original said 'This is a free public resource... Subscriber access unlocks Parts 3-31', implying Part 1/2 were meant as an ungated teaser. Now gated per Nixon's explicit instruction — flag if a free-teaser policy for Part 1 was actually intended, since that would need the opposite treatment. data-kw added 2026-07-12 for internal search (6 topics); Part 2 forward-link confirmed.

cross-reference-pages.note: Utility pages generated by parsing live QB + Notes HTML content, not hand-authored question/note content. Go stale if QB or Notes files are updated without a regeneration pass.

notes-master-index.html.purpose: Every Simon Sir Notes topic (Parts 1-8, 162 total) cross-referenced to its matching QB question via keyword-overlap matching. Unmatched topics flagged as gaps pending MIW Written/Engineering Management Notes coverage.
notes-master-index.html.regenerate_when: New Simon Sir Notes parts added, new QB questions added/edited, or MIW Written/Engineering Management Notes reach parity with a flagged gap topic (re-run cross-reference against written_content_index.json to resolve gaps).
notes-master-index.html.gating_rationale: Left ungated intentionally, matching oralnotes/index.html and meoclass1/index.html - it is a navigational index/cross-reference page (note titles + QB links only, no note content or QB question text), not a content file. noindex/nofollow keeps it out of search regardless.

examiner-index.html.purpose: Every QB question (585 total across 79 live files) bundled by Kochi MMD examiner (Nair, Simon, Rajappan, Srivastava, Senthil, Paul). Cross-multi-examiner questions appear under each tagged examiner.
examiner-index.html.public_teaser: /SQ/examiner-index.html - Paul Sir fully open (10 Qs), Simon Sir promoted/partially previewed (5 of 212 Qs shown), other 4 examiners shown as locked count-only cards.
examiner-index.html.regenerate_when: New QB questions built without a data-examiner attribute set at creation time (see miw-qb-production skill Section 5/7a) - manifest goes stale silently otherwise.
